summary: Agent infrastructure signals: sandbox runtimes, persistent memory, security layers, MCP tool ecosystems, and evaluation platforms dominate. Notable: OpenSandbox (sandbox), FastGPT (RAG), elizaOS (agentic OS), BitFun (desktop runtime), innerwarden (security), litefuse (eval), orchestkit (dev toolkit), local-llm-proxy (routing), nano-brain (memory), agent-opfor (adversary emulation), iris-security (governance), sage-harness (governance harness).

candidates.title: OpenSandbox - Secure sandbox runtime for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Fast, extensible sandbox for agent code execution

candidates.title: FastGPT - Knowledge platform with RAG and workflow
candidates.why_it_matters: Out-of-box RAG and AI workflow for agent knowledge

candidates.title: elizaOS - Open source agentic operating system
candidates.why_it_matters: Full agent OS runtime with memory and tools

candidates.title: BitFun - Desktop-grade agent runtime with memory
candidates.why_it_matters: Agent runtime with built-in code agent and computer use

candidates.title: InnerWarden - Local safety layer for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Screens risky commands and MCP calls, eBPF monitoring

candidates.title: Litefuse - Agent observability and evaluation platform
candidates.why_it_matters: Open-source eval and observability for agents

candidates.title: OrchestKit - AI dev toolkit for Claude Code
Local LLM Proxy - Token bank and smart routing
candidates.why_it_matters: Gateway for AI agents to manage token spend and routing

candidates.title: Nano-Brain - Persistent memory server for coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Hybrid search, knowledge graph, 14 MCP tools

candidates.title: Agent OpFor - Adversary emulation for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Open-source red teaming for agents and MCP servers

candidates.title: IRIS Security - AI agent governance SDK and MCP server
candidates.why_it_matters: Govern AI agents locally with tool permissions and audit

candidates.title: Sage Harness - Governance harness for coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Spec-SSOT closed loop for Claude Code and Codex

gaps: Limited signals on agent-to-agent communication protocols
Few evals for multi-agent systems beyond single-agent harnesses
